Table	Create Table
userAssignments	CREATE TABLE `userAssignments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `assignmentType` enum('university','college','cluster','department','program') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `collegeId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `clusterId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `departmentId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `programId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `userAssignments_userId_users_id_fk` (`userId`),
  KEY `userAssignments_collegeId_colleges_id_fk` (`collegeId`),
  KEY `userAssignments_clusterId_clusters_id_fk` (`clusterId`),
  KEY `userAssignments_departmentId_departments_id_fk` (`departmentId`),
  KEY `userAssignments_programId_programs_id_fk` (`programId`),
  CONSTRAINT `userAssignments_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
  CONSTRAINT `userAssignments_collegeId_colleges_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`collegeId`) REFERENCES `colleges` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
  CONSTRAINT `userAssignments_clusterId_clusters_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`clusterId`) REFERENCES `clusters` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
  CONSTRAINT `userAssignments_departmentId_departments_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`departmentId`) REFERENCES `departments` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
  CONSTRAINT `userAssignments_programId_programs_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`programId`) REFERENCES `programs` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
